message.content:
Explore the .claude directory structure in this project (/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system). I need to understand:

1. All hooks that exist (pre-tool, post-tool, startup, etc.)
2. The settings.json and settings.local.json configurations
3. Any other .claude configurations that could be reused

Focus on finding the actual hook implementations (shell scripts, their logic) and understand what each one does. The goal is to identify which can be reused in a new Tauri + React dashboard project called HQ.

List all files found with their purposes.

content.text: I'll explore the .claude directory structure to understand the hooks and configurations available for potential reuse.

input.description: Find all configuration and script files in .claude directory

input.command: ls -la /Users/anotonio.silva/.claude 2>/dev/null || echo "Directory not found at that path"
